_comment: Tracks skill versions across devices. Hash is MD5 of SKILL.md source. Bootstrap protocol (bsync.sh) compares this against installed versions.

tnb-digest.changelog: Manifest drift repair: hash resynced to the shipped bundle (source/bundle were ahead of the recorded manifest hash). No functional change.

comms.changelog: Plain-language-when-recipient-is-Brian rule (MANDATORY): every message to Brian — email/DM/ping, from either side — must read for a smart non-engineer. No naked jargon, lead with the decision/ask not the mechanism, never hand Brian a raw technical fork. Binding factor is the recipient, not the author (covers Nico's outgoing messages).

create-content.changelog: Trim SKILL.md frontmatter description to <=1024 chars (was 1248, tripped the Cowork install limit). Same triggers/coverage, condensed. No behavioral change from v1.5.0.

dev-deploy.changelog: Subagents section added (MANDATORY consideration): explicit propose-and-parallelize forcing function on every non-trivial build/debug/QA task — spawn independent agents in one message to run concurrently; criteria for when subagents help (parallel fan-out, independent verification, context isolation, specialization) vs. when they're overhead (small/linear, shared mutable state, coordination cost); rules of the road (no concurrent writers on the same files, scoped prompts, report integrated results). Pairs with the Acceptance Verification Harness — the independent verifier should be a separate agent.

expert.changelog: Added Consequence Check & Red Team layer — auto-triggers adversarial audit on high-stakes recommendations via 3-lens evaluation (direct downside, coherence risk, unforeseeable surface area)

frontend-design.changelog: Initial install — official anthropics/claude-code frontend-design skill. Forces design direction commitment before code, bans Inter/Roboto/Arial, eliminates AI-slop generic UI. Source: github.com/anthropics/claude-code/plugins/frontend-design

handoff.changelog: Step 2.2 now acts on bsync's manifest_synced field: a false means the manifest hash drifted from the skill source (edited without a manifest bump) — surface and fix before trusting version tracking; null = externally-authored skill, ignore. Backstop for the dev-deploy version+hash+bundle rule.

hc-strategy.changelog: Initial release — HC strategic brain with operating plan, expert research, quarterly review protocol. Hash corrected April 9 to match actual source.
hc-strategy.archived_note: Superseded by tnb-strategy as of April 3, 2026. Repo remains for reference but no longer actively maintained.

pm.changelog: Decision Map sharpened: implementation-method choices with a clear option are Nico's to decide and proceed on, even when they feel 'architectural' — they never go to Brian. Route-to-Brian narrowed to money / irreversible data / user-facing behavior / access Nico lacks. Hard rule: an item going to Brian only because it's technical is not a Brian item; Nico decides (with his rec) or routes to the PM, never stalls the build on a non-technical founder approving a method. Fixes the Songwriter's-Lab gating-method bounce-back.

priority-startup-intel.changelog: Major editorial recalibration after Brian feedback that briefings drifted toward mega-cap + Series-D-heavy content. HARD rules added: (1) Mega-cap cap — Anthropic/OpenAI/MAANG capped at 1 item per briefing, Ecosystem Signal section only, never in lede; Anthropic/OpenAI valuation news automatically excluded. (2) Stage sweet spot reset to pre-seed through Series B/C; Series D+ becomes table stakes requiring a non-obvious angle. (3) Lede Rule — only when 2+ private items share a thesis; never to summarize mega-cap or generic 'heavy deal flow' framing. (4) Item ordering by EDGE not deal size. (5) Stream 2 mandatory — query 8+ VC firm domains + Carta/Walker + YC blog before drafting; ≥60% of items must be Stream 2 or Series C-or-earlier. (6) Item length cap — 2–3 sentences max per item; 10–14 items per day; trade length for count. (7) Pre-flight checklist added to execution flow. (8) CVC framing rule for out-of-scope theses (robotics, AVs, hardware) reframed around in-scope angle.

tnb-strategy.changelog: Updated for repo reorganization (Apr 29 2026). Skill now reads README.md first for canonical vault index, then loads strategy/STRATEGY-CONTEXT.md, strategy/operating-plan.md, brand/POSITIONING-LANGUAGE.md, and brand/tnb-deck.md (markdown export of April 13 Drive deck). Path updates throughout. Drafts/ and ops/ subdirectories noted but not auto-loaded.
